name: [ - Tokyo Ghoul RP: New Order. - ]
description: [ - My take on making an RPG bot about Tokyo Ghoul [東京喰種] but in another country. More specifically, it will be something like "American" Ghoul - it will have new ghoul-hunting organization, new "band" of "evil" ghouls. It will also allow you to pick if you wish to be human or a ghoul. - ]
creator: Driggor
